Recall isolated-browser fixture

Inline selection compatibility

Select the complete article to exercise a long preview.

Systemd deployment repair

Set WorkingDirectory before restart. The service worked in a terminal but failed when systemd started it from a different directory. Keep the unit file, environment configuration, and working directory in sync before restarting the local service. 

sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl restart recall
sudo systemctl status recall

保存这段中文内容，并确认选区字符数准确，长内容可以在预览中上下滚动。

هذا نص لاختبار تحديد النص من اليمين إلى اليسار.
